title: Electrical Contractors & Cable tray and Panel Builders Manufacturer in Coimbatore | K.R. Power Supports Pvt Ltd
content:
About Us
KR POWER SUPPORT Electrical Contractors & Cable tray and Panel Builders Manufacturer in Coimbatore, established in the year 1995 with an ambition to deliver the needs of customers requiring services in “Electrical field”. For over 3 decades we provide a quality services and satisfaction in all our works.We carry out Electrical installation and panel works for large scale industries.
Hi-Mount Power Support & KR Engineering our sister concern is widely involved in Manufacturing of panel Boards, Control Panels, Bus Ducts, Cable trays and Solar structures. Starting from Coimbatore we extended our quality services in major states across India. We have a good team of experienced Engineers, Supervisors, Technicians and well-trained Labors. Our Professionals work diligently to ensure flawless services & customer satisfaction. We are undertaking to turn my projects also.
ORDERS EXECUTED
- Hospitals
- Textile Mills
- Sugar Plants
- Paper Mills
- Founderies
- Engineering Industries
- Ciment Plant
- Thermal Power Plant
- commercial complex
- Co-Generating Plants
SUCCESS RATE
All our success is attributed to our quality driven products that adhere to industry set parameters. In addition, we conduct stringent quality tests on the entire range of products. Thus, we ensure defect free products to reach the end users. With our exclusive R&D unit, we are able to renovate our range of products that has led us a huge reputation in the market. Moreover, with our client-centric approach, we are able to earn their trust and goodwill at all times. We have gained immense popularity with our prompt and timely delivery policies.
Our company is able to sustain the tough challenges and competitions of the industry under the able guidance of our Chairman & MD. He has invested his high business acumen and ethical values to lead us on the path of success. With his transparent and prompt business dealings, we have earned a huge client base in the market segments. Henceforth, we are able to reach the top position in lieu of our competitors.
“The price of success is hard work, dedication to the job at hand, and the determination that whether we win or lose, we have applied the best of ourselves to the task at hand.”

title: Cable tray Manufacturer in Coimbatore India | K.R. Power Supports Pvt Ltd
content:
Cable Trays Manufacturer
We are a leading Manufacturer of galvanized cable tray, stainless steel cable tray, cable tray, perforated cable tray, ladder cable tray and perforated type cable tray from Coimbatore, India. Constructed from a single sheet of perforated metal, they are convenient for cable which requires both a degree of protection from external damage and some ventilation.
Coupler holes in side guarantees easy connecting of cable trays to each other. Cable trays can be manufactured in Hot Dip Galvanized,Pre -Galvanized Finish.
PERFORATED CABLE TRAYS MANUFACTURER IN COIMBATORE
- G I Perforated Cable Trays
- Hot Dip Galvanized Perforated Cable Trays
- Powder Coated Perforated Cable Trays
- Stainless Steel
LADDER TYPE CABLE TRAYS MANUFACTURER IN COIMBATORE
- G I Perforated Cable Trays
- Hot Dip Galvanized Perforated Cable Trays

title: Perforated Cable Trays Manufacturer | K.R. Power Supports Pvt Ltd
content:
Perforated Cable Trays Manufacturer
These trays are fabricated from M.S sheets or PreGalvanized sheets. Perforated is done on the top of the trays, for ventilation and to tie the cables. various widths are available in standard lengths. The raw materials are procured from the reputed and authorised steel plants like JSW,POSCO,TATA and ESSAR steels., giving the highest priority in finishing and smoothness of cable trays ascertaining the safety of the cables run on it.
PreGalvanized trays are straight away used after fabrication ,No finishing is done on it . Ms trays are treated with enamel paint or powder coated painting or hot dip galvanizing.
Perforated Straight Channel Manufacturer in Coimbatore
- Strength: Light, Medium & Heavy Duty
- Raw Material: Mild Steel , GP Coil
- Width(W): 50 mm -1200 mm
- Height(H): 25 mm – 150 mm
- Thickness: 1.6 mm / 2.0 mm / 2.5 mm
- Length: 2500 mm / 3000 mm
- Finish – Mild Steel: Hot Dip Galvanizing as per IS 2629 / 2633 / 4759, Painted & Powder Coated
Perforated Inward Bend With Reinforcement Inclined Manufacturer in Coimbatore
- Strength: Light, Medium & Heavy Duty
- Raw Material: Mild Steel , GP Coil
- Width(W): 50 mm -1200 mm
- Height(H): 25 mm – 150 mm
- Thickness: 1.6 mm / 2.0 mm / 2.5 mm
- Inward Bend: 12 mm – 25 mm
- Inclined Bend: 12 mm – 25 mm
- Length: 2500 mm / 3000 mm
- Finish – Mild Steel: Hot Dip Galvanizing as per IS 2629 / 2633 / 4759, Painted & Powder Coated

title: Ladder Cable Trays Manufacturer in Coimbatore | K.R. Power Supports Pvt Ltd
content:
Ladder Cable Trays Manufacturer
Ladder type of cable trays are used for distributing heavy duty cables Manufacturer in Coimbatore, This may be economical to perforated cable trays with desirable features. The loading capacity is more , the strength of the cable trays can be tuned as per requirements.
As perforated trays ladder trays also are fabricated from M.S sheets with different finishing and PreGalvanized sheets for direct & immediate installation. The best advantage of ladder type cable trays are that moisture can’t accumulate on them.
Ladder Straight Cable Trays Manufacturer Coimbatore
- Strength: Light, Medium & Heavy Duty
- Raw Material: Mild Steel , GP Coil
- Width(W): 50 mm – 1200 mm
- Side Channel Height: 50 mm – 150 mm
- Run Width: 30 mm – 50 mm
- Run C to C: 250 mm / 300 mm
- Thickness: 1.6 mm / 2.0 mm / 2.5 mm
- Length: 2500 mm / 3000 mm
- Finish – Mild Steel: Hot Dip Galvanizing as per IS 2629 / 2633 / 4759, Painted & Powder Coated
